hero.title: Moni m'chilankhulo chilichonse
hero.lede: Tsambali limamasuliridwa ndi Resource Translator palokha, pa kukankha kulikonse kwakukulu, m'chinenero chilichonse chomwe Azure AI Translator imathandizira.

phrases.machine_translated: Makina omasuliridwa ndi Azure AI Translator.
phrases.open_pull_request: Tsegulani pempho lokoka ndi matembenuzidwe atsopano.
phrases.ship_anywhere: Tumizani mapulogalamu anu kulikonse padziko lapansi.

features.reliable: Maulendo ozungulira bayiti iliyonse ya mafayilo anu ogwera.
features.configurable: Kamvekedwe, mafakitale, glossary, kutukwana - zonse zimakonzedwa.
features.ci_native: Zopangidwira GitHub Zochita ndi kukoka-kupempha ntchito.

footer.powered_by: Zoyendetsedwa ndi Resource Translator ndi Azure AI Translator.
